ast.name: title
ast.source: Start a new Claude Code session

ast.name: title
ast.source: Clear terminal output without ending the session
ast.target: 清除终端输出而不结束会话

ast.name: error
ast.target: anchorNode 和/或 focusNode 为空

ast.name: error
ast.source: Blackglass: failed to start vault MCP server:
ast.target: Blackglass：启动保险库MCP服务器失败：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the claude CLI executable. Use 'claude' if it's on your PATH, or provide the full absolute path (e.g. /usr/local/bin/claude).
ast.target: Claude CLI 可执行文件的路径。如果它在您的 PATH 中，请使用 'claude'，或提供完整的绝对路径（例如 /usr/local/bin/claude）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Directory Claude Code starts in. Leave blank to use vault root. Claude will have access to files in this directory.
ast.target: Claude Code 启动的目录。留空则使用保险库根目录。Claude 将有权访问此目录中的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Claude model to use for the quick ask modal.
ast.target: 用于快速提问模态框的 Claude 模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Font size in pixels for the terminal panel.
ast.target: 终端面板的字体大小（像素）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of lines to keep in the terminal's scroll history (default 5000). Takes effect the next time the terminal is opened.
ast.target: 终端滚动历史记录中保留的行数（默认 5000）。下次打开终端时生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Font family for the terminal panel. Loading fonts...
ast.target: 终端面板的字体系列。正在加载字体...

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Weight or style variant for the selected font. Loading fonts...
ast.target: 所选字体的粗细或样式变体。正在加载字体...

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open the Claude Code terminal when Obsidian starts.
ast.target: Obsidian 启动时自动打开 Claude Code 终端。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pass --continue when starting a new session to resume the previous conversation context.
ast.target: 启动新会话时传递 --continue 以恢复之前的对话上下文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pass --dangerously-skip-permissions to Claude Code. Claude will execute tool calls without asking for confirmation. Only enable this if you trust the tasks you are running.
ast.target: 向 Claude Code 传递 --dangerously-skip-permissions。Claude 将在不请求确认的情况下执行工具调用。仅在您信任正在运行的任务时才启用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Starts a local MCP server that gives Claude vault-aware tools (read, search, create, update notes). Registers automatically in .mcp.json in the vault root.
ast.target: 启动一个本地 MCP 服务器，为 Claude 提供保险库感知工具（读取、搜索、创建、更新笔记）。自动在保险库根目录的 .mcp.json 中注册。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Claude can read and search notes but cannot create or update them. Takes effect the next time the MCP server starts.
ast.target: 启用后，Claude 可以读取和搜索笔记，但不能创建或更新它们。下次 MCP 服务器启动时生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Port the vault MCP server listens on (default 27123). If the port is in use, the next available port up to +4 is used automatically. Restart the plugin after changing.
ast.target: 保险库 MCP 服务器监听的端口（默认 27123）。如果端口被占用，将自动使用下一个可用端口，最多到 +4。更改后请重启插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Font family for the terminal panel.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Weight or style variant for the selected font.
ast.target: 所选字体的粗细或样式变体。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启动时打开 Claude 面板

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 恢复上次 Claude 会话

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用保险库 MCP 服务器

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 询问 Claude 关于此内容

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Opening link blocked as opener could not be cleared
ast.target: 打开链接被阻止，因为无法清除 opener。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: writeSync is unreliable and will be removed soon.
ast.target: writeSync 不可靠，将很快被移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: async parser handler taking longer than 5000 ms
ast.target: 异步解析器处理程序耗时超过 5000 毫秒

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault MCP server started. Start a new session for Claude to pick it up.
ast.target: 保险库 MCP 服务器已启动。请启动新会话以便 Claude 识别它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault MCP server stopped. Start a new session for the change to take effect in Claude.
ast.target: 保险库 MCP 服务器已停止。请启动新会话以使更改在 Claude 中生效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the full markdown content of a note in the Obsidian vault.
ast.target: 读取 Obsidian 保险库中笔记的完整 Markdown 内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the note, e.g. 'Daily Notes/2026-04-11.md'
ast.target: 笔记的保险库相对路径，例如 'Daily Notes/2026-04-11.md'

ast.name: description
ast.source: List notes and subfolders at a path in the vault. Omit directory or pass '' for the vault root.
ast.target: 列出保险库中某个路径下的笔记和子文件夹。省略目录或传递 '' 表示保险库根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative directory path. Omit or pass '' for the vault root.
ast.target: 保险库相对目录路径。省略或传递 '' 表示保险库根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search for notes whose filename or vault-relative path contains the query string (case-insensitive). Returns up to 20 matches.
ast.target: 搜索文件名或保险库相对路径包含查询字符串的笔记（不区分大小写）。最多返回 20 个匹配项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: String to match against note filenames and paths
ast.target: 用于匹配笔记文件名和路径的字符串

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the vault-relative path and full content of the note currently open in Obsidian.
ast.target: 获取当前在 Obsidian 中打开的笔记的保险库相对路径和完整内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new note in the vault. Fails if the note already exists.
ast.target: 在保险库中创建新笔记。如果笔记已存在则失败。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path for the new note, e.g. 'Notes/my-note.md'
ast.target: 新笔记的保险库相对路径，例如 'Notes/my-note.md'

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace the entire content of an existing note.
ast.target: 替换现有笔记的整个内容。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 笔记的保险库相对路径

ast.name: description
ast.target: 要写入的新 Markdown 内容

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search the full text content of all notes in the vault for a query string (case-insensitive). Returns matching notes with surrounding line context so you can decide which notes to read in full. Use this when you need to find notes by what they contain rather than what they are named.
ast.target: 在保险库中所有笔记的全文内容中搜索查询字符串（不区分大小写）。返回匹配的笔记及其周围行上下文，以便您决定要完整阅读哪些笔记。当您需要根据笔记内容而非名称查找笔记时使用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: String to search for within note content (case-insensitive)
ast.target: 在笔记内容中搜索的字符串（不区分大小写）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of matching notes to return (default 10, max 50)
ast.target: 返回的最大匹配笔记数（默认 10，最大 50）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit search to notes under this vault-relative directory. Omit to search the whole vault.
ast.target: 将搜索限制在此保险库相对目录下的笔记。省略则搜索整个保险库。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开 Claude Code 终端

ast.name: name
ast.target: 询问 Claude 关于此笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 询问 Claude 关于选中内容

ast.name: name
ast.target: 启动新的 Claude Code 会话

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 询问 Claude 任何问题...

ast.name: text
ast.target: 保险库 MCP 服务器
